title: Brown Mode
description: Changes the default GUI to be brown.
body:
Brown Mode changes the default GUI to be brown while keeping the vanilla style. 

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FD9Q4eqD/images/ce9246bd0e05bf14168ee26f7297071b180fd027.png)

---



### SOURCE

This pack is ONLY on Modrinth, anywhere else is not by me.

### COMPATIBILITY

Currently, I only have Java Edition 1.12-1.12.2 available. I'm planning to port to newer versions in the future, but this resource pack is not my top priority at the moment, since I'm working on two other GUI resource packs. 






#### TERMS OF USE

You CAN use this in videos and streams, credit to this pack would be greatly appreciated if you do.

Do NOT upload this to any other site and/or claim this as your own.

Do NOT take and use the textures for your own project, or anything else that reuses the textures for your own purposes.


##### Credit to HxnterV0ID for the idea/theme for this resource pack.
